_doc: Frozen baseline of methodology-audit findings. Updated only when the count for a pattern DECREASES. The CI test in test_methodology_audit_baseline.py asserts current_count <= baseline_count per pattern. To lower the baseline after fixing violations, rerun `uv run python scripts/audit_codebase_methodology.py` and update the corresponding entry in this file. Last updated 2026-05-18 post-Gemini-audit fixes.
